name: Sentiment Analysis — LLM Classification Quality
description: Validates that an LLM correctly classifies text sentiment and returns structured results. Demonstrates the framework applied to a different domain (NLP classification) beyond question extraction.

tests.description: Clearly positive review should classify as positive with high confidence
tests.input: Classify the sentiment of this product review: 'Absolutely fantastic! The build quality is outstanding and it works flawlessly. Highly recommend.' Return JSON with sentiment and confidence.

tests.description: Clearly negative review should classify as negative
tests.input: Classify the sentiment of this product review: 'Terrible experience. The product broke after two days and customer service was unhelpful. Waste of money.' Return JSON with sentiment and confidence.

tests.description: Mixed/neutral review should classify as neutral with moderate confidence
tests.input: Classify the sentiment of this product review: 'The product is okay. It does what it says but nothing special. Delivery was on time.' Return JSON with sentiment and confidence.
